name: Damiana Liqueur
recipeInstructions:
Damiana is a small shrub that grows in the SW United States and in Mexico. Among the natives of NW Mexico, it is reputed to be an aphrodisiac. It has a strong aromatic herbal scent slightly reminiscent of sage or thyme.
Steep the damiana in the vodka for one week. Strain and filter. Sweeten with the sugar syrup or honey.
